verses.text: Ka khutte galdona ding ka khutmete galkapna dingin a hilh, keimah a hong hu, Topa in thupha ngah ta hen
Amah pen ka suangpi leh ka munkip muan'huai, ka kulhpi leh hong honkhiapa, ka lum leh ka belhpa, ka nuai-ah mite a zopa ahi hi
Topa aw, nangmah in na hong phawk tham dingin mi pen bang hi a, nangmah in na hong ngaihsut tham dingin mihing' tapa bang ahi hiam
Mi pen husan' khat tawh kibang a, ama hunte pen a tai dandan nilim tawh kibang hi
Topa aw, na vanpite niamsak in la, hong paisuk in. Mualte lawng in la, meikhu suaksak in
Khuaphialep phiasak in la, amaute kithehthang sak in. Na thaltangte lawn in la, amaute susia in
A sangna mun panin na khut hong zan in la, tui lian lauhuaite leh gamdang mite' vangliatna panin hong honkhia in
A kam uh tawh zuauthu a gente leh limtakin kiciamna a bawl khit ciang nangawnin zuauthu mah a gen lai vevete' kiang pan kei hong phel in la, hong honkhia ta in
Pasian aw, la thak khat kong sak ding a, harp zangsawm khausai lasakna nang kong tum ding hi
Kumpite tungah gualzawhna a piapa, na nasem David a honkhiapa na hi hi
A gilo galte kiang panin kei hong hon in la, a kam uh tawh zuauthu a gen limtakin kiciamna a bawl khit ciang nangawnin zuau a gen lai veve gamdang mite' khutsung pan kei hong honkhia in
Ka tapate uh a tangval lai-in khang cingin a khauh mahmah singkungte bang ta hen la, ka tanute uh a nungak lai-in kumpi inn lamna dinga a kisui innkiu khuampite bang ta hen
Ka saalte uh a dimin an nam khempeuh om ta hen la, ka tuute uh a tultul a thenthen-in gamlakah suak ta hen
Ka kongzingte uhah cimawhin kikona om kei ta hen
Tua bang thupha a ngah mi mi lungdam ahi hi. Topa pen amau' Pasian ahi mite pen mi lungdam ahi hi.
